shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The deployable slime family keeps large eyes and a soft bubble rim.
differences: The mini unit uses the lightest silhouette at 32x32px and communicates weight value 1.
Cream highlight bands sit on the upper-left arc.
The mouth stays minimal so several pieces remain readable in adjacent cells.

context.usage: Base single-cell slime used for early placement and merges.

specs.texture: Soft bubble rim with light internal swirl pixels.
specs.shading: Flat fill with one cream highlight arc.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet size is exactly 128x32px with 4 columns and 1 row.
Eye placement stays inside a 10x8px central zone on every frame.
The outline never touches the outermost texture border.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_slime_units
reference_images.purpose: Grounds slime silhouettes, evolution scale, and facial placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle with a lightweight idle timer.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/character_bubble_mini_idle_4f_8fps.png during the Loading state and cache the atlas handle in a slime art registry resource.
runtime_notes: Snap the slime root transform to the board cell center.
Drive idle animation through a shared timer resource.
Keep a 2px transparent gutter on every frame.
